---
name: Discovery / shaping
about: Investigation, design, or clarification work that is not yet ready for deterministic implementation
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the problem, idea, or area that needs investigation or clarification.

## Why This Is Not Yet Implementation-Ready

Explain what is currently missing.

Examples:

- unclear requirements
- unresolved design choices
- missing domain knowledge
- incomplete reproduction
- uncertain scope
- conflicting constraints

## Questions to Answer

List the questions this issue is intended to resolve.

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Known Facts

Document what is already known.

## Unknowns and Risks

Document what is still uncertain and what risks those uncertainties create.

## Desired Output

Describe what this issue should produce.

Examples:

- a clarified implementation issue
- a recommendation
- a design note
- a reproduction
- a decision record
- a scoped follow-up issue set

## Relevant Context

Link any related issues, docs, PRs, notes, screenshots, logs, or external references here.

## Completion Criteria

Describe what would make this issue complete.

This should usually be phrased in terms of clarified understanding, documented options, or creation of follow-up implementation work, rather than shipped code.
